days.title: Sentosa Island Exploration
days.weather: Partly cloudy with a chance of afternoon showers. High of 32°C, Low of 25°C.
activities: Check into hotel and visit Universal Studios Singapore in the morning.
Relax at Siloso Beach and enjoy water sports in the afternoon.
Dinner at Sentosa Boardwalk with a view of the Marina Bay skyline.
days.budgetNote: Entry tickets for USS are included in the allocated budget. Meals are moderate.

days.title: Cross-Border Adventure to Johor Bahru
days.weather: Hot and humid with scattered thunderstorms in the late afternoon. High of 33°C, Low of 26°C.
activities: Take the shuttle bus to Johor Bahru early morning.
Visit Legoland Malaysia for half-day or explore Danga Bay.
Return to Singapore by evening, shopping for souvenirs at Little India.
days.budgetNote: Transport costs between SG and JB are accounted for. Legoland entry is the major expense.

days.title: Singapore City Icons and Nature
days.weather: Clear skies in the morning, becoming cloudy with high heat. High of 32°C, Low of 25°C.
activities: Morning visit to Gardens by the Bay and the Supertree Grove.
Lunch at Marina Bay Sands Food Court.
Evening light show at Spectra and walking tour around Clarke Quay.
days.budgetNote: Gardens by the Bay free gardens are open; conservatory tickets are budgeted. Dinner is budget-friendly.

days.title: Cultural Heritage and Departure
days.weather: Warm with intermittent rain showers. High of 31°C, Low of 24°C.
activities: Explore the colonial architecture in the Civic District.
Visit Chinatown and try local hawker food.
Last-minute souvenir shopping at Orchard Road before heading to the airport.
days.budgetNote: Day focuses on free walking tours and hawker center meals to preserve budget for flights/shopping.

categories.name: Clothing
items: Swimwear (for Siloso Beach and water sports)
Lightweight long-sleeve shirt or cover-up (sun protection)
Light jacket or cardigan (for heavy AC in malls/indoors)

categories.name: Toiletries & Health
items: High SPF sunscreen (UV index will be high)
Travel-sized shampoo/body wash (if hotel doesn't provide)

categories.name: Electronics
items: Universal power adapter (Type G if coming from outside UK/SG standard, though SG uses Type G)
Camera or smartphone with good camera

categories.name: Documents & Money
items: Hotel and flight confirmations (digital or print)
Small amount of cash (SGD and MYR for Johor Bahru)

categories.name: Accessories & Miscellaneous
items: Compact umbrella or lightweight rain poncho (afternoon showers likely)
Daypack or small backpack for daily excursions
